creator: michael@galassi.us
text:
In the file /etc/rc.d/ipfw, in the function ipfw_prestart() there is some unneeded repetition.  Specifically, the variables firewall_nat64_enable, firewall_natv6_enable, and firewall_pmod_enable are each checked twice so that if any one of them is set the required_modules variable will have the relevant module added twice.  This is harmless but clearly incorrect.

The fix is to delete lines 46 to 54 inclusive.
